conclusion: No n=7 witness pattern satisfying the two-circle cap can be geometrically realized.

representatives.obstruction: The common-witness chord map is a permutation of the 21 chords. It has an odd cycle, but each map edge would impose perpendicularity; alternating perpendicularity around an odd cycle is impossible for nonzero Euclidean chords.
